ORDER SUSTAINING CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. RES JUDICATA, BASED ON PLAINTIFF'S PRIOR CLAIM, BARS THIS ACTION. THE CLAIMS ALSO ARE BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS, THE FAILURE TO FILE A TIMELY CLAIM AND THE LITIGATION PRIVILEGE AS IT RELATES TO NURSE LEWIS' TESTIMONY. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT AFTER DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. JUDGMENT IS HEREBY ENTERED IN FAVOR OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. DEFENDANT IS ENTITLED TO RECOVERY OF STATUTORY COSTS, FEES AND DISBURSEMENTS AS MAY SUBSEQUENTLY BE FIXED ACCORDING TO PROOF. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-12-2008 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-03-2008 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST DEFENDANT(S) NURSE LEWIS. THE SEP-19-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-03-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR, AUG-12-2008 ORDER SUSTAINING DEMURRER WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND ENCOMPASSES CLAIM AGAINST NURSE LEWIS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2008 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-11-2008 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-03-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-12-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jason Garza (922.7781) plaintiff and responding party appearing in propria persona
Daniel Zaheer of the Office of the City Attorney (554.3822) for defendant and moving party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. Res judicata, based on plaintiff's prior claim, bars this action. The claims also are barred by the statute of limitations, the failure to file a timely claim and the litigation privilege as it relates to Nurse Lewis' testimony. Order signed in open Court. (302/PJM/VC) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
